content: (Late visual context as seen by MJR (the player): The scene depicts a dark, underwater environment with a staircase leading down into the depths of the ocean. The scene reveals a series of jellyfish-like creatures emitting a soft, blue-green glow from their translucent bodies. These creatures are scattered throughout the area, some near the staircase and others floating in the distance. In the foreground, the staircase is visible, comprising large stone steps that descend into the darkness. The steps appear worn and weathered, indicating age and exposure to the ocean's elements.)
